_comment: Org settings for CLASSIFIED (SIPRNet/JWICS) systems. Findings marked N/A on classified networks.

notApplicable.title: DoD Interoperability Root CA cross-certificates in Untrusted store
notApplicable.reason: Cross-certificates only required on unclassified systems. Classified networks do not interoperate with external PKI.

notApplicable.title: US DoD CCEB Interoperability Root CA cross-certificate in Untrusted store
notApplicable.reason: CCEB cross-certificates only required on unclassified systems.

notApplicable.title: DoD Interoperability cross-certificates in Untrusted store
notApplicable.reason: Cross-certificates only required on unclassified systems.

notApplicable.title: CCEB Interoperability cross-certificates in Untrusted store
notApplicable.reason: CCEB cross-certificates only required on unclassified systems.

notApplicable.title: Defender AV must disable local setting override for reporting to MAPS
notApplicable.reason: MAPS (Microsoft Active Protection Service) cloud reporting is not applicable on classified systems — no internet connectivity.
notApplicable.reference: Check text: 'This is applicable to unclassified systems'

notApplicable.title: Defender AV must check in real time with MAPS before content runs
notApplicable.reason: MAPS real-time cloud check not applicable on classified systems — no internet connectivity.
notApplicable.reference: Check text: 'This is applicable to unclassified systems'

notApplicable.title: Defender AV must join Microsoft MAPS
notApplicable.reason: MAPS cloud membership not applicable on classified/air-gapped systems.
notApplicable.reference: Check text: 'This is applicable to unclassified systems'

notApplicable.title: Defender AV must only send safe samples to MAPS
notApplicable.reason: MAPS sample submission not applicable on classified systems.
notApplicable.reference: Check text: 'This is applicable to unclassified systems'

notApplicable.title: Check for publishers certificate revocation must be enforced
notApplicable.reason: Certificate revocation checking requires internet access (CRL/OCSP). N/A on SIPRNet.
notApplicable.reference: Check text: 'If the system is on the SIPRNet, this requirement is NA'

notApplicable.title: Prevent bypassing SmartScreen Filter warnings must be enabled
notApplicable.reason: SmartScreen Filter requires internet access. N/A on SIPRNet.
notApplicable.reference: Check text: 'If the system is on the SIPRNet, this requirement is NA'

notApplicable.title: Prevent bypassing SmartScreen Filter warnings about files not commonly downloaded
notApplicable.reason: SmartScreen Filter requires internet access. N/A on SIPRNet.
notApplicable.reference: Check text: 'If the system is on the SIPRNet, this requirement is NA'

notApplicable.title: Managing SmartScreen Filter use must be enforced
notApplicable.reason: SmartScreen Filter requires internet access. N/A on SIPRNet.
notApplicable.reference: Check text: 'If the system is on the SIPRNet, this requirement is NA'

orgDefined.value: Type 1 encryption for directory replication data in transit
orgDefined.reason: Classified systems transferring replication data through a network at a lower classification must use NSA Type 1 cryptography.
